privileged_info_summary: I have audited the task and verified that the task involves generating synthetic sequence and schedule files for the Ekos tool. The target output directory /home/ga/Documents/Ekos and expected file names (m81_lrgb.esq, ngc1499_ha.esq, m42_hdr.esq, and master_schedule.esl) are explicitly documented in setup_task.sh, correctly collected in export_result.sh, and checked in verifier.py.
